channel.title: Research Radio
channel.description: AI-generated deep dives into computational social science research. Papers curated by Fabio Giglietto, discussions produced by Google Gemini.
channel.itunes:author: Fabio Giglietto & Gemini AI
channel.itunes:summary: AI-generated deep dives into computational social science research. Papers curated by Fabio Giglietto, discussions produced by Google Gemini.

item.title: FG's Research Radio: Durably reducing conspiracy beliefs through dialogues with AI
item.description:
AI-generated podcast discussion.
Reference: Costello, T. H., Pennycook, G., & Rand, D. G. (2024). Durably reducing conspiracy beliefs through dialogues with AI. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.adq1814

item.itunes:summary:
AI-generated podcast discussion.
Reference: Costello, T. H., Pennycook, G., & Rand, D. G. (2024). Durably reducing conspiracy beliefs through dialogues with AI. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.adq1814
